arcs.title: The Goblin Election
arcs.summary: Christine received the owl Monday morning, read it twice, set down her tea, and has said nothing to Ragnok yet. Ragnok has reclassified his office as 'in audit' for the morning. Griphook the Younger has issued a statement and filed a procedural request for Christine's reference in triplicate — a rule that does not exist. The Election Board's Thursday opening arguments now include a fifteen-minute procedural hearing on the triplicate question. Day 4 should cover Christine's formal reply or first direct word with Ragnok — and possibly her decision on whether to give the reference at all, which has begun to feel like its own kind of negotiation.
